---
title: "樹木形質ブラウザ"
---

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/tree-browser.css">

<div id="tree-browser-app" class="tree-browser-app" aria-live="polite">
  <section class="tb-toolbar" aria-label="検索と操作">
    <div class="tb-title-block">
      <p class="tb-kicker">Tree Network</p>
      <h1>樹木形質ブラウザ</h1>
    </div>

    <div class="tb-search-wrap">
      <label for="tb-search">検索</label>
      <input id="tb-search" type="search" placeholder="和名・学名・科・属・形質で検索" autocomplete="off">
    </div>

    <div class="tb-actions">
      <span id="tb-result-count" class="tb-count-pill">0種</span>
      <button id="tb-reset" type="button">リセット</button>
    </div>
  </section>

  <main class="tb-layout">
    <aside class="tb-filter-panel" aria-label="形質フィルタ">
      <div class="tb-panel-head">
        <h2>絞り込み</h2>
        <span id="tb-active-filter-count">0条件</span>
      </div>
      <div id="tb-filters" class="tb-filters"></div>
    </aside>

    <section class="tb-results-panel" aria-label="検索結果">
      <div class="tb-results-head">
        <h2>該当樹種</h2>
        <p id="tb-result-summary">データを読み込み中です。</p>
      </div>
      <div id="tb-results" class="tb-results"></div>
    </section>
  </main>
</div>

<script src="assets/tree-browser.js"></script>
```
